title: 无标题文章
summary: I used to love Keynote for my slide decks but I've since become a full @ iapresenter convert (from the folks @ ia ). tastefully chosen constraints and display, all with the power of markdown.
content: I used to love Keynote for my slide decks but I've since become a full @iapresenter convert (from the folks @ia ). tastefully chosen constraints and display, all with the power of markdown.
